S.FORM: Mulatu Teshome I 1955 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 1 a romi'ad masofoc ci Mulatu Teshome, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Ethiopia anini i ci Mulatu Teshome, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 7 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: mo~u~u…ĺato~u~u t…ôsńßo~um…ô i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i mo~u~u…ĺato~u~u t…ôsńßo~um…ô, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u …ôtńßio~upia anini i ¶i mo~u~u…ĺato~u~u t…ôsńßo~um…ô, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Mulatu Teshome I 1955 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 1 a romi'ad masofoc ci Mulatu Teshome, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Ethiopia anini i ci Mulatu Teshome, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 7 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: mo~u~u…ĺato~u~u t…ôsńßo~um…ô i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i mo~u~u…ĺato~u~u t…ôsńßo~um…ô, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u …ôtńßio~upia anini i ¶i mo~u~u…ĺato~u~u t…ôsńßo~um…ô, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
